title: Phaser Performance Fixes That Made CodeGrind's City Mode More Stable
summary: Recent CodeGrind work focused on Phaser performance: pausing on tab changes, cleaning keyboard input, and preloading assets for smoother city mode.

social.bluesky_text: CodeGrind’s latest Phaser updates boost city mode stability: visibilityChange handling for pause/resume, keyboard input cleanup on pause, and preloading optimizations. These fixes reduce friction in real browser conditions....
social.linkedin_text: CodeGrind has focused on practical Phaser performance improvements to make the city mode experience smoother, more stable, and less error-prone. Highlights include visibilitychange handling for pause/resume, keyboard input cleanup on pause, and asset preloading optimizations. Full details here: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/08/phaser-performance-fixes-city-mode/
